title: Tooltips Purple (Ancient)
description: Adds subtle purple highlights to tooltips.
body:
# Tooltips Purple (Ancient)
### A sleek violet touch for your Minecraft UI

**Tooltips Purple** brings a refined, amethyst-inspired look to your game’s tooltips — blending deep purples and smooth highlights for a clean yet magical feel.  
Each tooltip frame has its own unique style and lore, adding personality without breaking Minecraft’s vanilla charm.

---

### 🟣 Frame Variations (Check Other Packs)
- **[Ancient Frame](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltips-purple-ancient)** — Relic of ages. 
- **[Cobble Frame](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltips-purple-cobble)** — Forged from stone.  
- **[Rune Frame](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltips-purple-rune)** — Whispers of magic. 
- **[Echo Frame](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltips-purple-echo)** — Depths still echo.

Each frame variant gives your tooltips a distinct identity — from grounded and simple to mystical and ancient.

---

### ✨ Features
- Elegant purple-tinted borders  
- Subtle glow for readability  
- Vanilla-friendly and clean design  
- Multiple frame variants for themed customization  
- Works seamlessly with other UI packs  

---

### 📦 Compatibility
- Minecraft **1.21+**  
- Works with both **Default** and **Dark UI themes**  
- Compatible with other resource packs  

---

*Bring the glow of amethyst and the whispers of the End into your Minecraft interface.*
